info.title: Uno.UI.RuntimeTests.Engine.Wasm.Runner
info.description: WASM runtime tests runner for Uno Platform applications. Serves WASM apps and collects test results via HTTP. Requires Playwright to be installed separately.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
Uno Platform WASM Runtime Tests Runner

Prerequisites:
  - Install Playwright: npx playwright install chromium
  - Or: dotnet tool install -g Microsoft.Playwright.CLI && playwright install chromium
